title: UDMS: A canonical schema and assessment framework for DJ metadata quality
description:
This deposit is the replication package for a cross-platform study of metadata in real-world DJ libraries. It introduces UDMS (Unified DJ Metadata Schema): eleven canonical fields, Camelot key normalization, and BPM 2× checks. The repository includes Python adapters for Rekordbox, Serato, Engine DJ, and VirtualDJ; a comparison engine; parsed exports with anonymized file paths; a 27-page LaTeX paper; and a standalone JSON Schema at schema/udms_schema.json.

Reported results show that genre and editorial fields (ratings, labels) are often sparse, while musical key is comparatively complete and agrees well across platforms after normalization. BPM disagreements are dominated by a systematic Rekordbox half-tempo doubling heuristic versus Serato and Engine DJ in several dance subgenres (an interpretation effect, not transfer loss). On matched cross-platform pairs, title, artist, and album strings agree exactly.
